lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Good day, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy more bank slots.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Why? You don't use the bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah... Never mind then.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 50. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [number] slots please.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Buying [number] additional bank slots will cost [number] coins. Be warned, this purchase is not reversible. Are you happy to proceed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... I don't seem to have enough money for that. Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm happy with that.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Your additional bank slots have been added.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I'm afraid not! You've already got as much bank space as you can obtain without purchase.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 50. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I'm not supposed to tell you this, but you can obtain more bank space by [setting up a PIN], [setting up an Authenticator] [or] [upgrading to a Jagex Account].

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 50. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We have branches in many towns.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what do you do?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: We will look after your items and money for you. Leave your valuables with us if you want to keep them safe.

sections.title: When the Party Room chest contains more than 50,000 or 76,000 coins in Grand Exchange value (on a F2P or members' world respectively)

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Party! Party!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Something's happening in the party room!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Everyone get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: What's happening in the party room?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Someone's having a big party!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Get to the party room NOW!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Get to the party room quick!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Big value items in the party room now!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Quick! Get to the party room!
